sections.subtitle: An Ecotour of Biodiversity Conservation & Ethnic Culture
sections.text: Embark on a captivating journey to the Lashi Wetlands, a crucial ecosystem in Yunnan. Explore the wetland park and conservation bureau, understanding the importance of wetland preservation. Observe unique biodiversity in the Lashi Wetland Reserve and immerse yourself in the rich cultural traditions of local Naxi and Yi minorities. Hike to breathtaking Luoma Cliffs for panoramic views and enjoy genuine village experiences with local cuisine.

items.title: Wetland Park Ecosystem
items.subtitle: Lashi Nature Reserve
items.text: Visit the Lashi Wetland Park and delve into the heart of its ecosystem. Learn about the intricate relationships within the wetland environment, understanding the delicate balance of flora and fauna in this critical habitat.

items.title: Conservation Bureau
items.subtitle: Wetland Conservation
items.text: Gain exclusive insights into wetland conservation at the Lashi Wetland Conservation Bureau. Meet with conservationists, learn about their ongoing projects, and understand the challenges and strategies involved in preserving this crucial ecosystem.

items.title: Wildlife Observation
items.subtitle: Lashi Wetland Reserve
items.text: Venture into the Lashi Wetland Nature Reserve, experiencing its rich tapestry of wildlife and flora. Learn to identify unique bird species and native plants, understanding their vital role within this fragile ecosystem.

items.title: Nanyao Village Culture
items.subtitle: Nanyao Village
items.text: Connect with the local Naxi community during a visit to Nanyao Village, relishing the authentic flavours of a traditional fish farm lunch. Share in a taste of their culture, their sustainable practices, and the warm hospitality that has been their hallmark for generations.

items.title: Luoma Cliffs Trek
items.subtitle: Luoma Cliffs
items.text: Undertake a short but memorable trek through the forests to the dramatic Luoma Cliffs, where sweeping views of the surrounding landscape await. Enriched by insights into local forest biodiversity and conservation.

items.title: Yi Village Dinner
items.subtitle: Boduoluo Yi Village
items.text: Conclude your day with a visit to Boduoluo Yi minority village and enjoy a traditional dinner with the locals. Experience the local Yi culture, enjoy local flavors, and interact with the community in a genuinely authentic and memorable cultural exchange.

activities: Begin your adventure at the serene Lashi Wetland Park, where misty mornings awaken the wetland ecosystem. Learn about the intricate relationships within this critical habitat and observe diverse bird species in their natural environment.

Visit the Lashi Wetland Conservation Bureau and meet with passionate conservationists. Gain exclusive insights into ongoing conservation projects and the challenges of preserving this crucial ecosystem.

Explore the Lashi Wetland Nature Reserve, learning to identify unique bird species and native plants. Understand their vital role within this fragile ecosystem and the importance of preserving this natural treasure.
Trek through the forests to the dramatic Luoma Cliffs, where sweeping views of the surrounding landscape await. Enriched by insights into local forest biodiversity and conservation efforts.

Visit Boduoluo Yi minority village and enjoy a traditional dinner with the locals. Experience the local Yi culture, savor authentic local cuisine, and interact with the community in a genuinely memorable cultural exchange.

contactNote.text: For groups of 1 person or more than 6 people

included.text: English-Speaking Coordinator/Guide (Lynne Lyu or Lukasz Madrzynski), Local Guide, Entrance Tickets to the Nature Reserve, Traditional Local Lunch and Dinner, Private Transportation, Outdoor Travel Insurance.
included.notIncluded: Personal Expenses (Souvenirs, Snacks, etc.), Voluntary Gratuities for the Coordinators/Guides
included.meetingPoint: Pickup: 9:00 AM at your Lijiang hotel | Return: Approximately 8:00 PM to your Lijiang hotel

sections.subtitle: Click on a question to reveal the answer

items.question: What should I bring?
items.answer: We recommend comfortable hiking shoes, layers for changing temperatures, sun protection, a water bottle, binoculars for birdwatching, and your camera. Detailed packing list provided upon booking.

items.question: Is this suitable for children?
items.answer: Yes! This tour is family-friendly. Children under 12 should be accompanied by an adult. The mild hiking distance (5-6 km/day) is achievable for most fitness levels and ages.

items.question: What's the cancellation policy?
items.answer: Full refund if cancelled 7+ days before the tour. 50% refund for 3-6 days. No refund within 48 hours. Weather contingencies always have alternatives.

items.question: What happens if it rains?
items.answer: Most activities continue in light rain. For safety during heavy storms, we'll adjust the itinerary to focus on indoor conservation center visits and cultural experiences.

items.question: Are there any physical requirements?
items.answer: Basic fitness is recommended. You'll walk up to 6 km per day on gentle trails. The terrain is easy but at altitude (up to 3,250m), pace will be slower.

items.question: How do I get to the meeting point?
items.answer: We provide pickup from any hotel in Lijiang Old Town area. If you're staying outside this area, please contact us to arrange an alternative meeting point.

items.question: What language do the guides speak?
items.answer: Our guides are fluent in English. For other languages, please inquire about availability.

items.question: How does this trip support conservation and sustainable development?
items.answer: Each booking directly supports local conservation efforts and community development. We partner with the Lashi Wetland Conservation Bureau, employ local Naxi and Yi guides and community hosts, and contribute to environmental protection initiatives. Your adventure creates lasting positive change.

seo.metaTitle: Living Waters of Lashi Ecotour | Lashi Wetlands Nature Reserve
seo.metaDescription: Experience the alpine wetland, grassland and forests ecosystems on an unforgettable ecotour in Lijiang. Explore biodiversity & conservation at Lashi Wetlands, discover Naxi & Yi ethnic cultures, admire the spectacular Luoma Cliffs & enjoy village life. Perfect for nature lovers & cultural travelers seeking authentic Yunnan travel experience.
